chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal 281 of 2021 High Court Appeal 282 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ HCA 281/2021 1. For hearing of CMA No.2341/2021 2. For hearing of main case HCA 282/2021 1. For hearing of CMA No.2343/2021 2. For hearing of main case 17.09.2025 Mr. Sajjad Mangi, advocate holds brief for Mr. Mukesh Kumar Khatri, advocate for the appellants These are time barred appeals, as discernable from CMA Nos.2341 and 2343 of 2021. These appeals have been pending for over four years and office note demonstrates that even today they are listed on the discrepancy that notice has not been issued as appellants’ counsel has not paid process fee etc. Be that as it may, brief is being held on behalf of the appellants’ counsel and adjournment being sought for no cogent reason whatsoever. It appears that the appellants are not interested in pursuing with these appeals therefore the same are dismissed for non-prosecution. Office is directed to place copy hereof in the connected file. Judge Judge B-K Soomro
